response.overview: Fără Sense is a Romanian vertical-first mockumentary series set inside a chaotic modern company where nobody truly knows what they are doing, but everyone pretends they do.  Blending workplace comedy, internet culture and social satire, the series explores burnout, pointless meetings, corporate ego clashes, social media obsession and the absurd realities of modern work life through a fast paced and highly relatable format built specifically for the mobile generation.  At the center of the story is Andrei Severin, the real life CEO of the company behind the project, playing a fictionalized version of himself in a self aware portrayal of leadership inside a collapsing corporate ecosystem.  Combining actors, creators and internet personalities, Fără Sense turns modern work culture into cinematic chaos.
response.title: Fara Sense Filmul
